description: Representative visual/render baseline policy for the file-based rhwp-mcp gate. This is intentionally a small mixed set, not a broad corpus sweep.

visual_diff_policies.name: government-original-vs-edited-page18-diff
visual_diff_policies.intent: Localized middle-heading edit in a government form

visual_diff_policies.name: foreign-investment-original-vs-reopened-page1-diff
visual_diff_policies.intent: Authored HWPX save/reopen must be visually identical on page 1

visual_diff_policies.name: business-overview-original-vs-reopened-page1-diff
visual_diff_policies.intent: Compact business HWPX save/reopen must be visually identical on page 1

visual_diff_policies.intent: Edited long RFP HWPX save/reopen must be visually identical on page 1

visual_diff_policies.name: hwp-multi-original-vs-reopened-page1-diff
visual_diff_policies.intent: Authored multi-table/picture HWP save/reopen must be visually identical on page 1

visual_diff_policies.name: field-memo-original-vs-edited-page2-diff
visual_diff_policies.intent: Authored field/memo HWP shape text-box field localized edit on page 2

visual_diff_policies.intent: Edited authored field/memo HWP save/reopen must be visually identical on page 2

visual_diff_policies.intent: Authored water-mark HWP save/reopen must be visually identical on page 1
